scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet announces his message to the people of Makkah.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet standing on a mountain, with the city of Makkah in the background, holding a scroll and speaking loudly.

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet announces his message to the people of Makkah.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 59
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of sharing the message of Islam with others

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet stood on a mountain overlooking Makkah and declared his message to the people. He held a scroll in his hand and spoke loudly, calling the people to Islam.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. The scene takes place on a rugged mountain overlooking the ancient city of Makkah, with its sand-colored buildings and mud-brick architecture. A vast expanse of the Arabian Desert stretches behind the city. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm glow over the scene, with the sun's rays peeking over the mountain ridge. In the foreground, the central figure is seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, standing confidently with one hand extending from his robe, holding a rolled-up parchment in a scroll. In the background, the city of Makkah is visible, with its mud-brick buildings and palm trees swaying gently in the breeze. Soft warm golden light, majestic and inspiring mood. Medium shot from a slightly elevated angle. Warm beige, golden, and deep green palette. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
